description_line1: The next generation of intelligent, fast, and beautifully designed AI.
description_line2: Crafted with precision and modern UX for a seamless experience.
dashboard_subtitle: Your intelligent AI workspace — fast, modern and powerful.
ai_chat_desc: Ask anything and get intelligent AI responses.
summarizer_desc: Convert long text into short, clear summaries.
rewriter_desc: Rewrite text with clarity and creativity.
translator_desc: Translate text instantly between multiple languages.
image_gen_desc: Generate images from text in seconds.
code_assistant_desc: Fix bugs and improve your code using AI.
chat_welcome: Hello! How can I assist you today?
chat_ai_response: This is an example AI response. Connect API later.
summary_sample_response: This is an example summary. Connect to real AI API later.
rewriter_sample_response: This is a rewritten example. Real AI will rewrite it better.
code_sample_response: This is an example code analysis. Real AI will explain or fix the code.
agent_placeholder: Describe a task for the AI agent to perform...
agent_sample_response: This is an example task execution. Real AI can automate workflows later.
